response.overview: A young man is unsure why images of a woman appear in his mind, until he has a revelation after dreaming something blue. He soon realises that it is impossible to ignore due to the landscape he inhabits. Filmed on the unpredictable Super 8 format, Pure. (except it’s not) is an exploration in neutralizing queer identity with the Welsh landscape’s heteronormativity.
response.title: Pure. (except it's not)
